opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected and no online scheduling on site or GMB.
opportunities.observation: Boise-area HVAC customers searching after hours book competitors with instant online scheduling instead.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 booking widget tied to Owyhee's calendar to capture after-hours HVAC leads.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No CRM or email marketing tools detected and no recurring revenue signals on the Nampa-area site.
opportunities.observation: Owyhee's existing customers aren't being prompted for seasonal tune-ups, leaving recurring revenue on the table.
opportunities.fix: Automate pre-season AC and heating reminder campaigns via SMS and email to past Nampa/Boise customers.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM Automation
opportunities.signal: No CRM detected, phone-only contact method, and no digital intake tools present on the website.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call from Nampa and Boise prospects disappears with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture and auto-CRM logging so every inbound Owyhee lead is tracked and followed up.
